raw_input:
[4.0/5] My New Back Scratcher I don't know anyone who can really reach their back without a special tool, but few roll up like these do. I like how my complimentary set is so easy to store, either flat or rolled up.

Inside the package you find 3 separately sealed scrubber sponges.

As someone with sensitive skin I was concerned about them hurting to use but one side is much softer than the other and it really felt great. This makes a great back scratcher. I did notice some fraying even from the first use, not much but enough to give me the heads up that these will not last a very long time but maybe 2-3 weeks of daily use each if your careful perhaps longer. [5.0/5] This exfoliating back scrubber set of three loofahs is amazing! This set is absolute necessity if you want ... This exfoliating back scrubber set of three loofahs is amazing! This set is absolute necessity if you want to have quality bath or sauna experience. I purchased this set because I was looking for a long scrubber to reach the middle of my back. I found several on this site, and I'm so glad I picked this set. This set has three long scrubbers - every member of your family will have one own. The length is perfect and is long enough to reach the middle of my back. This scrubber has good texture, not too soft not too hard and this helps to create a gentle lather. This set works perfectly and exfoliate really well. I bought this to use only on my back, but I love the way it exfoliate, and so now I'm using it on my arms and legs as well. Another side is a soft terry cloth like. I have steam room at home so I use it every day! Love love love and I would recommend this to a friend! My reviews are based on my experience with the product and not affected by the discount I received. I always shop on Amazon myself and I don’t like being misled by fake reviews. Please click Yes if my review was helpful for you. [5.0/5] All natural fiber, not synthetic, great size, quality materials, great for back, and bottom of feet while standing.. [[VIDEOID:afb2da82dbb3f0a99fd45908e6066228]] All natural fiber not synthetic, almost 30 inches in length not including the braided cotton rope handles, approx 3.5 inches in width, i have used these and they are a great way to loofah your back, feet especially i like to use them for the bottom of my feet also, feels great, makes your skin ultra smooth, exfoliates dead skin cells, and if you use hyrdolic acid creams etc it will help rid you of the dead cells left on your skin from that, the middle portion which is the loofah is about 11.5 inches long and the sides are a terry velour feel, nice quality materials, well made, will last better then my previous loofahs on a stick that always seem to fall off, also you could probably just put these in the washing machine on gentle cycle, be sure to hang these in a dry place in your bathroom, and soak them in a essential oil like tea tree or lavender which will help prevent bacteria from growing, you can use a very mild bleach solution, or a vinegar diluted solution also to spray on them, you should replace your loofah about once a month or every 3 months if you are only using them twice a week, love this product, for quality materials, design, and function all exceed my expectation, and although i received a promo discount for opinion will continue to use these and will be a loyal customer, and prefer loofah
like this over washcloths for exfoliation and a smoother skin.
nice cotton braided handles make it easy to use. [5.0/5] Five Stars Bought these for my husband. He loves them. Long enough that he has no awkwardness scrubbing his back. [5.0/5] Five Stars We like these and the are great for dry brushing or showers :) [5.0/5] great great product, wish i had it years ago. [5.0/5] Great addiction to hygiene Great for scrubbing back and not to brittle or harsh. [5.0/5] Perfect item for that great scrubbing on the back. I've been using these now for over 6 months before writing this review

Perfect item for that great scrubbing on the back. I'm a big guy and very strong so I was not expecting the pull loops to be very well made as most are not, But these I can actually pull relatively hard on for a real scrubbing and they are holding up just fine., Now lets be reasonable if you grab these pull loops and pull with all your might with intention of breaking the sewing points then you will. But I can pull as much as I need to for a good scrub and the other ones out here on Amazon land wont even hold up. [5.0/5] Five Stars very good. [5.0/5] Gentle yet exfoliates nicely. The back is the hardest spot to reach for everything from cleaning, to exfoliating, to moisturizing that I tend to slack on that area as much as I hate to admit it. The loofah back and body scrubber sponge has changed all that for me from the second I used it. They are so easy to use and comfortable to hold. The belt-like portion is long enough where I can hold both handles and not feel strained or awkward but relaxed as I loofah away. The handles are very soft and braided. The belt is about 28 inches long and 3 1/4 inches wide. The loofah makes up about 11 inches in the middle. It's soft and not paper thin but kind of squishy and padded if that makes sense. It's put together very well, feels and looks of high quality. I've used other loofahs in the past that were very hard and actually hurt to use. I've been pleasantly surprised by these in the fact that they truly do give a gentle exfoliation. They feel nice and never too rough or scratchy. I absolutely love that these don't hurt because I honestly used to be scared of most loofah products. I also love that there are three of them in this pack. Not that I want to share cause I like them a lot although you could share with a spouse if need be. I suggest keeping them all to your self though because, well, they are very nice quality. I did receive a promotional product although my thoughts and opinions are always completely my own and unbiased. [5.0/5] Loofah yourself... New items in original packaging. So far, good quality construction and feels good. [1.0/5] disappointed dont like product [1.0/5] Not sure about those great reviews. Broke after the first, I repeat first, PULL! It wasn't even wet yet. I have since sewn it with heavy duty nylon thread. We'll see. Manufacturers, really??? Not sure about those great reviews...buyers just know...you gotta look at the 1 stars for the truth. [5.0/5] These worked great. They have held up well also After surgery it can be difficult to reach back, feet, etc. These worked great.
They have held up well also. [5.0/5] Well-Made, Effective Loofahs These loofah back and body scrubbers are wonderful. I received the pack very quickly and love that it came in a pack of 3. My husband, my son, and myself each got one for ourselves. I have used one before in the past so I am going to compare to that and these are way longer. The length really helps with my shorter arms and being able to reach without strain is great. The scrubbers are a good width as well, it makes scrubbing in the shower quicker and more efficient to give a good clean with more ease.

The material is a very soft and natural terry cloth. The feeling against my back when using is amazing. It does not feel scratchy at all and just seems to remove the grime and dirt well. It definitely cleanse my skin wonderfully. Also, the terry cloth seems to give an exfoliation that just an average loofah does not. It is usually hard for people to exfoliate their back because of the area and reaching problems so once I used this I could seriously feel a difference from just the first use with removing dead skin cells. I feel softer and smooth every time.

The scrubbers have really convenient handles, large enough for even my husbands big hands and easy to hold the soft fabric. The handles seem to be attached well and the seams on the scrubber itself have stayed tight even through using almost every day.
After using I just hang the loofah scrubber up by one of the handles and it dries fast enough for the next use.

Such a sweet deal for the pack of 3 and even better is the great quality. I would recommend this to others and actually think I am going to grab a pack for my mother. Its perfect for those who want ease of use when cleaning areas that are hard to reach as well as just having a luxurious feeling when in the shower. I received these loofahs for a slightly reduced price in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. If for any reason I find that I need to change my review, I will update this. [5.0/5] Five Stars good product [1.0/5] One Star package only came with 2 sponges.. cannot speak for sponges themselves

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, most customers are very happy with this set of loofah back scrubbers, which comes in a pack of 3. The most commonly praised features are the length of the scrubbers, which makes it easy to reach the middle of the back without strain, and the dual-sided design, with a loofah side for exfoliation and a softer terry cloth side for gentler use. Many reviewers noted that the scrubbers are effective at removing dead skin cells and feel comfortable to use, even for those with sensitive skin. The handles were generally praised for being sturdy and easy to grip, though one reviewer reported that theirs broke on the first use. The pack of 3 was seen as great value, allowing multiple family members to each have their own.

On the negative side, a few reviewers had complaints. One noted some fraying after the first use and estimated the scrubbers would only last 2 to 3 weeks with daily use. Another was disappointed that their package only came with 2 scrubbers instead of 3. One reviewer simply said they did not like the product without providing details.

Several reviewers mentioned receiving the product at a discount in exchange for their review, but stated their opinions were honest and unbiased.
